steps.title: Factor the expression
steps.content: The GCF is $x^3$. Factor it out:$$7x^5-5x^4+9x^3=x^3(7x^2-5x+9)$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The factored form is $x^3(7x^2-5x+9)$. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above is $x^3(7x^2 - 5x + 9)$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so B is correct.
